metadata.title: Routine Tracker — Build Better Habits, Transform Your Life
metadata.description: Easily track your daily habits. Stay motivated with streaks, weekly stats, and analytics.

hero.badge: 🔥 Stay motivated with the streak system
hero.description: Set up your daily habits in minutes. See your progress with streaks and weekly charts — never lose your momentum.
hero.ctaNote: No credit card required · 3 routines on free plan

features.title: Everything you need, in one place
features.subtitle: No complicated apps needed. A clean, fast, and effective routine tracking experience.

smartTracking.title: Smart Tracking
smartTracking.description: Create daily, weekly, and monthly routines in seconds. Complete with a checkbox, see your progress instantly.

streaks.title: Flaming Streaks
streaks.description: Complete your routine every day and grow your streak. Streaks are tracked visually and you'll be warned before they break.

analytics.title: Advanced Analytics
analytics.description: Examine your last 7 days' performance with interactive charts. Discover which days you're most productive.

items.quote: When I saw the streak system, my motivation doubled in the first week to never skip a routine.
items.name: Elif K.

items.quote: I didn't expect such a powerful tracking system in such a clean interface. I use it daily.
items.name: Mert A.

items.quote: After upgrading to Pro, the weekly charts showed me which days I'm actually more productive.
items.name: Selin T.

cta.title: Create your first routine today
cta.description: Thousands of users use Routine Tracker to track their habits. It's your turn.

layout.quote: Build better routines. Track every action. Stay consistent.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue
login.terms: By continuing you agree to the

emailSent.title: Check your inbox
emailSent.description: We sent a magic link to {email}. Click the link to sign in.

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.OAuthSignin: Could not start Google sign-in. Please try again.
errors.OAuthCallback: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
errors.OAuthAccountNotLinked: This email is registered with a different method.
errors.EmailSignin: Could not send magic link. Please try again.
errors.EmailCreateAccount: Your account could not be created. Please try again.
errors.Default: Something went wrong. Please try again.

register.title: Create account
register.description: New accounts are created automatically after your first sign-in.

metadata.title: My Routines
metadata.description: Manage and track your daily routines. Stay consistent and build lasting habits.

dashboard.errorMessage: An error occurred while loading data. Please refresh the page.

emptyState.title: No routines yet
emptyState.description: Start tracking by adding your first routine. You can create daily, weekly, or monthly routines.

routineList.title: My Routines
routineList.subtitle: Track your daily habits
routineList.limitWarning: {count}/{max} routines — You've reached the free plan limit. Upgrade to PRO for unlimited routines.
routineList.emptyDescription: Start tracking by adding your first routine.
routineList.allDone: Awesome! You completed all of today's routines! 🎉

routineCard.completeDescription: Add an optional note about your completion.
routineCard.deleteDescription: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.

addRoutine.title: New Routine
addRoutine.description: Create a new habit to track.
addRoutine.limitDescription: Free plan allows up to {max} routines. Upgrade to PRO for unlimited routines.

metadata.title: Leaderboard
metadata.description: See how you rank among other users. Earn XP by completing routines and climb the leaderboard.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Complete routines, earn XP, rise to the top!
leaderboard.emptyDescription: Complete your routines to earn XP and get on the leaderboard!

metadata.title: Settings
metadata.description: Manage your account, notifications, and subscription preferences.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and notification preferences.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.enabledDescription: Get daily reminders for your incomplete routines.
notifications.disabledDescription: This feature is available for PRO users only.

subscription.manageDescription: Manage payment method, invoices, or cancel subscription.

metadata.title: My Statistics
metadata.description: Analyze your habit data with detailed charts, streaks, and performance insights.

stats.title: My Statistics
stats.subtitle: Analyze your habit data and visualize your progress.
stats.monthlySuccessSubtitle: Active day rate in last 30 days
stats.completionRateSubtitle: Rate of days with at least 1 completion in last {days} days

radar.title: Weekly Consistency
radar.description: Completion distribution by day of week

routineSuccess.title: Routine Performance
routineSuccess.description: Success rates for your active routines

bestWeekday.title: Best Day
bestWeekday.description: You perform best on {day} with {count} completions!

topRoutine.title: Most Consistent
topRoutine.description: {name} has a {rate}% success rate — great discipline!

weakRoutine.title: Needs Attention
weakRoutine.description: {name} is at only {rate}% — try setting a reminder.

monthlyImprovement.title: On the Rise
monthlyImprovement.description: You improved {percent}% compared to last period!

monthlyDecline.title: Slight Dip
monthlyDecline.description: Activity dropped {percent}% — you can bounce back!

weekendWarrior.title: Weekend Warrior
weekendWarrior.description: You're more active on weekends than weekdays.

weekdayWarrior.title: Weekday Warrior
weekdayWarrior.description: You're more active on weekdays — weekends could use a boost.

share.downloadError: Could not create image, please try again.
share.nativeShareText: Check out my habit tracking progress!

reminder.headerSub: Today {count} routines are waiting for you
reminder.lead: You have {count} routines to complete today. Every completion strengthens your streaks.
reminder.alertRisk: {count} routines with streaks at risk! They'll reset if you don't complete them today.
reminder.footer: You're receiving this because email notifications are enabled.

proGate.description: Unlock {feature} and everything else Pro has to offer.

STREAK_FREEZE.name: Streak Freeze
STREAK_FREEZE.description: Protects your streak for one missed day. Automatically used when your streak is about to break.
